rules.name: useEffect with data fetching without caching
catches: Data fetching in useEffect without caching
fix: Use TanStack Query for data fetching

recommendation.title: Use TanStack Query for data fetching
recommendation.description: useEffect with data fetching should be replaced with TanStack Query for better caching, error handling, and loading states.

patterns.message: useEffect with fetch - consider TanStack Query for caching

recommendation.title: Use context or composition to avoid prop drilling
recommendation.description: Props passed through 3+ levels. Consider React Context or component composition.

patterns.message: Potential prop drilling - consider context or composition

rules.name: Generic try/catch with Something went wrong
catches: Users don't know what went wrong

recommendation.title: Add specific error handling
recommendation.description: Generic try/catch with Something went wrong message. Add specific error handling.

patterns.message: Generic error message - add specific error handling
Generic error message - add specific error handling
Generic error message - add specific error handling

recommendation.title: Add context to console.log statements
recommendation.description: Multiple console.log statements without context. Use structured logging with appropriate log levels.

patterns.message: Multiple console.log statements - use structured logging with context

rules.name: Files without corresponding tests
catches: No test file for source file

recommendation.title: Add tests for this file
recommendation.description: No corresponding test file found. Add tests to ensure code reliability.

rules.name: Server-only imports in client code
fix: Use dynamic imports for server modules
Move server logic to server components

recommendation.title: Avoid server-only imports in client code
recommendation.description: Server-only modules imported in client code increase bundle size. Use dynamic imports or move server logic.

patterns.message: Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size
Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size
Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size
Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size
Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size
Server-only module imported in client code - this increases bundle size

recommendation.title: Add authorization checks
recommendation.description: Authentication is present but authorization checks are missing. Ensure users have permission for actions.

patterns.message: Authentication found but no authorization checks - add permission checks
